.github/workflows/CI.yaml.general_idea: Upgrade the GitHub Actions checkout action to version 4.

.tool-versions.general_idea: Upgrade the local Java runtime version from 11 to 21 to align with the target JDK for the migration.
Upgrade the local Python runtime version from 3.11 to 3.12.

element-templates/inbound-template-conne.general_idea: Add a new 'Output' group section to the element template definition.
Move the 'Sender' property from the 'endpoint' group to the 'config' group.
Add a 'Result variable' property to the template for storing event contents.
Add a 'Variable expression' property to the template for mapping event elements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Consolidate connector SDK version properties into a single 'version.connectors' property.
Update JUnit Jupiter dependency version to 5.10.2.
Update Maven Clean Plugin version to 3.3.2.
Update Maven Compiler Plugin version to 3.12.1.
Update Maven Dependency Plugin version to 3.6.1.
Update Maven Shade Plugin version to 3.5.1.
Update Maven Surefire Plugin version to 3.2.5.
Update connector-core dependency to use the consolidated version property.
Update connector-validation dependency to use the consolidated version property.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Refactor the class to use a Java record to replace the boilerplate code for a simple data carrier.
Simplify event correlation by passing the event object directly.
src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.why_exists: The correlate method signature likely changed to accept the event object directly instead of requiring a separate variable assignment or different overload.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Rename local variable from connectorContext to context for brevity.
Refactor class to use Java record for immutable data carrier.
Remove unused import for custom Secret annotation.
Reorder modifiers in static final field declaration to follow standard Java conventions.
Reformat method signature to place parameters on separate lines for readability.

src/main/java/io/camunda/connector/inbou.general_idea: Collapse multi-line lambda expression into a single line for conciseness.

Refactor a standard Java class into a Java record to leverage modern language features for immutable data carriers.
